title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Comparing ML Models INFS3822
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity – Building ML Models Pre-requisites Please complete all Week 5 Pre-Seminar Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section. Please complete the following in-class activities: o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Upload Data to SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Exploration o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Transformation o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Feature Selection o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Building ML Models

Step by step guide Open your project on SAS Viya Model Studio. Please refer to Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya to create a project). Once your project is open, click on the Pipelines tab. Then, add open the Model Comparison results.

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Model Comparison node. CRICOS Provider Code 00098G
